source.panel: sealed pinned panel, 160 artifacts, SHA-256 manifest, sealed 2026-07-02

excluded_exploratory.reason: mechanical 3x-median concordance exclusion (leave-one-out discordance 0.556 vs median-of-others 0.0055); collected and reported as exploratory observer only

staleness_rule: A configured operator model-version string absent from measured_under means the version floor was not measured under that version: the run report must say 'version floor stale -- re-read the sealed panel' and a sealed-panel re-read (VE-2 procedure) is due before longitudinal claims are epoch-stamped against this manifest.
reread_trigger: Any laddered family ships a new model version (VE-2 trigger). The re-read uses the sealed pinned panel as-is; no atlas is invalidated by staleness -- only across-epoch drift attribution is gated.
